rows.description: # 3 Yrs Pensions to the Bishop & Dean & Ch. of Sarum
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirmed gemini-flash's reading ('#', 'Yrs', 'Bishop', '& Ch.', 'Sarum') as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's. gpt-5-mini's note correctly highlighted the faintness and abbreviation but contained more reading errors, making gemini-flash's overall output more trustworthy despite its less detailed note.
